title: 5Pcs Measuring Spoons Set, 1/4 TSP, 1/8 TSP, 1/16 TSP, 1/32 TSP, 1/64 TSP Stainless Steel Tiny Measuring Spoons for Cooking Baking Powders, Spices
features: Handy Teaspoon Measuring Spoons - Easily measure tiny amounts with 5pcs stainless steel spoons, including 1/4 tsp, 1/8 tsp, 1/16 tsp, 1/32 tsp, and 1/64 tsp, providing precise measurements for any recipe.
Durable Stainless Steel Construction - Made of high-quality stainless steel, these measuring spoons are durable, corrosion-resistant, and dishwasher safe, ensuring long-term use and easy cleaning.
Convenient Storage and Usage - The split-ring design allows for easy storage and removal of individual spoons, fitting perfectly into small jars and providing easy access whenever needed.

Clearly Marked Mini Measuring Spoons - Each spoon is marked with its measurement, eliminating the guesswork for accurate cooking and baking, making it easier to use the correct amounts required in the recipe.
Essential for Accurate Measurements - This set of mini spoons is a must-have for precise measuring of small amounts, ensuring the perfect balance of ingredients in every dish and dessert.
